message:
feat(connectors): add Aider connector and expand connector dispatch

Concurrent agent work: add Aider AI coding assistant connector
implementation and update connector module dispatch and library
re-exports to include the new backend.

- New src/connectors/aider.rs: Aider session detection and parsing
- Update src/connectors/mod.rs: register Aider connector in dispatch
- Update src/lib.rs: export new connector module
